name: vivicy
description: A visual autonomous dev factory: write the canonical spec, Vivicy extracts issues, the two-agent loop implements + reviews + verifies, all driven from the architecture map. Language- and project-agnostic.
author: Tomy Spagnoletti Duval

scripts.factory:test: node --test factory/progress-ledger.test.mjs factory/semantic-extraction-check.test.mjs factory/dev-loop.test.mjs factory/traceability-check.test.mjs factory/spike-check.test.mjs factory/spike-proofier.test.mjs factory/reference-check.test.mjs factory/map-review.test.mjs factory/excerpt-drift.test.mjs factory/change-control.test.mjs factory/re-drive.test.mjs factory/atomic-write.test.mjs factory/doc-baseline.test.mjs factory/extract-issues.test.mjs factory/leg-timeout.test.mjs factory/project-config.test.mjs factory/prompts.test.mjs
